problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type may resolve What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
